scripts.build:all: bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-linux-x64-glibc --target bun-linux-x64 && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-linux-arm64-glibc --target bun-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-linux-x64-musl --target bun-linux-x64-musl && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-linux-arm64-musl --target bun-linux-arm64-musl && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-windows-x64.exe --target bun-windows-x64 && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-windows-arm64.exe --target bun-windows-arm64 && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-darwin-x64 --target bun-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile index.ts --outfile dist/npk-extractor-darwin-arm64 --target bun-darwin-arm64
